name: Szechuan Beef Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 4 teaspoons Oriental dark roasted sesame oil (divided)
1 small Red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 package (8 oz) Frozen baby corn, defrosted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef steak lengthwise into two strips and slice across the grain into 1/8-inch thick strips.
2. Combine soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oil, sugar, and cornstarch; stir into strips.
3. Heat remaining 2 teaspoons oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add garlic, ginger, and pepper pods; cook for 30 seconds.
5. Add bell pepper and corn; stir-fry for 1-1/2 minutes.
6. Add pea pods; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
7. Remove vegetables from the skillet.
8. Stir-fry beef strips in batches (2-3 minutes).
9. Return vegetables and beef to the skillet and heat through.
Makes 4 servings.
Serving Suggestion: Hot cooked rice.
